subcodes.first_line: O steadfast and assured believer! The human reality is as a niche for the light and a glass for manifestation. This reality possesseth delicacy and freshness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن موقن حقیقت انسانیه مشکاه نوردر و زجاجه ظهوردر بو حقیقت لطافت و طراوت
subcodes.subjects: @light and darkness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @human reality created in the image of God
